name: Rosreestr Public Cadastral Map (PKK)
operator: Federal Service for State Registration, Cadastre and Cartography (Rosreestr)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, land categories, permitted use, cadastral values
description: Russia's public cadastral map providing parcel boundaries, land categories, cadastral values and ownership types for the entire Russian Federation.

name: NSPD - National Spatial Data System
operator: Rosreestr / Government of Russia
dataType: Cadastral data, administrative boundaries, land use, infrastructure, protected areas
description: Russia's new national spatial data infrastructure portal replacing the legacy PKK, integrating cadastral, administrative, environmental and infrastructure layers with ESIA authentication.

name: Open Data Portal of the Russian Federation
operator: Ministry of Economic Development of Russia
dataType: Multi-domain open data including cartography, economics, transport, health
description: Russia's federal open data portal aggregating datasets from federal, regional and local government bodies across all domains including a limited cartography section.

name: Roshydromet / Meteoinfo.ru
operator: Federal Service for Hydrometeorology and Environmental Monitoring (Roshydromet)
dataType: Weather forecasts, satellite imagery, radar composites, climate data
description: Primary Russian meteorological portal providing weather forecasts, satellite imagery, radar composites and alerts through interactive maps and visualizations.

name: AISORI Climate Data Archive
operator: VNIIGMI-MCD / Roshydromet
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, pressure, humidity, wind from station network
description: Long-term daily climate data archive from VNIIGMI-MCD covering over 100 years of observations from hundreds of Russian meteorological stations.

name: VSEGEI Geological Maps Database
operator: A.P. Karpinsky Russian Geological Research Institute (VSEGEI)
dataType: Geological maps at 1:200,000 to 1:10,000,000, mineral deposits, tectonic maps
description: Russia's principal geological research institute maintaining the state geological map database with multi-scale geological, geophysical and metallogenic maps of the Russian Federation.

name: Roscosmos Geoportal
operator: Roscosmos / NTs OMZ (Research Center for Earth Operative Monitoring)
dataType: Satellite imagery from Resurs-P, Kanopus-V, Meteor-M series
description: Russia's space agency geoportal providing access to the Federal ERS data fund with satellite imagery from domestic Resurs-P, Kanopus-V and Meteor-M spacecraft at up to 70 cm resolution.

name: NTs OMZ Basic Products Bank
operator: NTs OMZ / JSC Russian Space Systems
dataType: Processed satellite imagery products from Russian EO satellites
description: Processed Earth observation products bank operated by Russia's Research Center for Earth Operative Monitoring, providing standardized basic products from domestic satellite constellations.

name: TKGM Parsel Sorgu (Cadastre Parcel Inquiry)
operator: General Directorate of Land Registry and Cadastre (TKGM)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, land registry, ownership, orthophotos
description: Turkey's official parcel inquiry system allowing cadastral queries by province, district, coordinates or map with downloadable parcel data in multiple geospatial formats.

name: AFAD Earthquake Data Portal
operator: Disaster and Emergency Management Presidency (AFAD)
dataType: Earthquake epicenters, magnitudes, depth, strong motion records, hazard maps
description: Turkey's national earthquake monitoring portal providing real-time and historical seismic event data, strong motion records, hazard maps and seismic zone classifications.

name: DSI - State Hydraulic Works Water Data
operator: General Directorate of State Hydraulic Works (DSI)
dataType: Stream flow, water levels, sediment loads, water quality, groundwater levels
description: Turkey's State Hydraulic Works managing all surface and groundwater resources with over 1,000 water quality monitoring stations and comprehensive hydrological measurement network.

name: HGM Atlas - Turkish National Map Service
operator: General Directorate of Mapping (HGM)
dataType: Topographic maps, orthophotos, administrative boundaries, geodetic network
description: Turkey's official national mapping atlas portal operated by HGM providing topographic maps, orthophotos and geographic products through web map services.

name: CSB Environmental Atlas and CORINE Portal
operator: Ministry of Environment, Urbanisation and Climate Change (CSB)
dataType: CORINE land cover, environmental indicators, air quality, water quality
description: Turkey's environmental indicator platform providing CORINE land cover change statistics, air quality indices and water quality monitoring data across all Turkish provinces.

name: Turkey CORINE Land Cover Portal
operator: Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry of Turkey
dataType: CORINE land cover/use classification at three levels
description: Turkey's dedicated CORINE land cover portal providing 44-class land use/cover maps at three hierarchical levels for five mapping epochs from 1990 to 2018.

name: TAGEM - Agricultural Research and Policies
operator: General Directorate of Agricultural Research and Policies (TAGEM)
dataType: Soil surveys, crop production, agricultural statistics, research data
description: Turkey's agricultural research directorate coordinating 48 research institutes nationwide providing soil surveys, crop data, and agricultural research publications.

name: NSDI Geoportal of Kazakhstan
operator: Government of Kazakhstan
dataType: Topographic, cadastral, administrative boundaries, infrastructure
description: Kazakhstan's official NSDI geoportal providing open geospatial data layers including topographic maps, administrative boundaries and infrastructure for the entire republic.

name: QazGeodesy - National Centre of Geodesy and Spatial Information
operator: RSE National Centre of Geodesy and Spatial Information (QazGeodesy)
dataType: Geodetic control points, digital aerial photography, topographic maps, GIS data
description: Kazakhstan's national geodetic and cartographic agency providing geodetic control, digital aerial photography, topographic surveys and GIS data services.

name: Kazhydromet Meteorological Database
operator: RSE Kazhydromet
dataType: Temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity from 347 stations; climate cadastre
description: Kazakhstan's national hydrometeorological service providing freely accessible meteorological station data from 347 stations, updated monthly, with a climate cadastre dating back to 1966.

name: National Geological Service of Kazakhstan
operator: JSC National Geological Service (NGS)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral deposit data, borehole records, geophysical data
description: Kazakhstan's national operator for geological information managing the National Data Bank of Mineral Resources with over 30,000 digitised geological reports and the Kaznedra digital platform.

name: Open Data Portal of Kazakhstan
operator: Government of Kazakhstan (e-Government)
dataType: Multi-domain datasets including administrative boundaries, infrastructure, statistics
description: Kazakhstan's e-government open data portal with over 3,000 datasets from central and local government bodies including administrative-territorial classifiers with geospatial relevance.

name: Kazakhstan Gharysh Sapary (KGS) Earth Observation
operator: Kazakhstan Gharysh Sapary (KGS)
dataType: Satellite imagery from KazEOSat-1 (1 m) and KazEOSat-2 (6.5 m)
description: Kazakhstan's national space company providing Earth observation imagery from the KazEOSat satellite constellation at 1 m and 6.5 m resolution for environmental monitoring and mapping.

name: NAPR - National Agency of Public Registry (Georgia)
operator: National Agency of Public Registry (NAPR)
dataType: Land parcels, real estate registry, cadastral maps, ownership data
description: Georgia's national land and property registration agency providing cadastral maps, real estate registry services and systematic land registration for 1.2 million hectares across 59 municipalities.

name: Georgia NSDI Geoportal
operator: National Agency of Public Registry (NAPR) / Government of Georgia
dataType: Administrative boundaries, topographic maps, land use, spatial metadata
description: Georgia's National Spatial Data Infrastructure geoportal established in 2013, providing shared access to spatial metadata and web services from over 83 government bodies following INSPIRE standards.

name: NEA Georgia - Hydrometeorology Department
operator: National Environmental Agency (NEA) of Georgia
dataType: Weather forecasts, hydrological data, climate monitoring, environmental quality
description: Georgia's national hydrometeorological service providing weather forecasts, hydrological bulletins and environmental monitoring data from Georgia's observation network.

name: Cadastre Committee of Armenia - National Geoportal
operator: Cadastre Committee of the Republic of Armenia
dataType: Cadastral parcels, buildings, land ownership, orthophotos, relief
description: Armenia's national cadastral agency and geoportal providing cadastral maps, building footprints, ownership data, orthophotos and relief layers with OGC-compliant web services.

name: MapArmenia.am - Spatial Data Bank
operator: Cadastre Committee of the Republic of Armenia
dataType: Hydrographic network, transport, relief, cadastral maps, orthophotos
description: Armenia's national spatial data bank platform launched in 2022 providing public access to hydrographic, transport, relief, cadastral and orthophoto layers with geospatial analysis capabilities.

name: ArmStateHydromet - Hydrometeorology Service of Armenia
operator: Service of Hydrometeorology and Active Influence on Atmospheric Phenomena (ArmStateHydromet)
dataType: Weather observations, hydrological data, climate monitoring, air quality
description: Armenia's national hydrometeorological service under the Ministry of Emergency Situations providing weather observations, hydrological bulletins and environmental monitoring since 1930.

name: E-Cadastre Armenia - Online Real Estate Services
operator: Cadastre Committee of the Republic of Armenia
dataType: Real estate transactions, property extracts, cadastral documents
description: Armenia's electronic cadastral services platform for online property registration, document requests and real estate transaction processing through the YES-EM authentication system.

name: State Service on Property Issues - Azerbaijan Cadastre
operator: State Service on Property Issues under the Ministry of Economy of Azerbaijan
dataType: Real estate registry, cadastral data, property addresses, land valuation
description: Azerbaijan's central authority for real estate cadastre, property registration and land address assignment operating under the Ministry of Economy.

name: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources of Azerbaijan
operator: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources of Azerbaijan
dataType: Air quality, water quality, biodiversity, geological data, forest inventory
description: Azerbaijan's central environmental authority providing data on air and water quality, biodiversity monitoring, geological surveys and natural resource management since 2001.

name: Azerbaijan National Hydrometeorological Department
operator: National Hydrometeorological Department / Ministry of Ecology of Azerbaijan
dataType: Weather observations, climate data, hydrological monitoring
description: Azerbaijan's national hydrometeorological service operating under the Ministry of Ecology providing weather forecasts, climate data and the Center for Climate Change and Ozone monitoring.

name: State Statistical Committee of Azerbaijan - Environment Data
operator: State Statistical Committee of the Republic of Azerbaijan
dataType: Environmental statistics, land use, water resources, emissions, waste
description: Azerbaijan's official statistical agency providing environmental data including air and water resources protection, land use, mineral extraction, toxic waste and environmental expenditures.

name: Azerbaijan Forest Atlas
operator: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources of Azerbaijan
dataType: Forest cover, forest types, protected areas, biodiversity zones
description: Interactive forest atlas of Azerbaijan providing spatial visualization of forest cover, forest types, protected areas and ecological zones across the country.

name: GeoInfo.kz - Kazakhstan Geospatial Services
operator: GeoInfo Kazakhstan
dataType: Satellite imagery, topographic maps, geospatial analytics
description: Kazakhstan's geospatial information services provider offering satellite imagery, topographic mapping and GIS analytics for government and commercial clients.

name: ScanEx - Russian Earth Observation Services
operator: ScanEx Group
dataType: Multi-satellite imagery, fire monitoring, agricultural monitoring
description: Russia's leading commercial EO company operating a satellite data receiving station network and providing fire monitoring, agricultural analytics and geoportal development services.

name: TAKBIS - Land Registry and Cadastre Information System
operator: General Directorate of Land Registry and Cadastre (TKGM)
dataType: Land registry records, deed transactions, cadastral data, spatial data
description: Turkey's integrated Land Registry and Cadastre Information System (TAKBIS) digitising all land registry offices into a unified national spatial database with institutional web service access.
